methods.description: This method involves the examination and imaging of a fossil specimen contained within Rovno amber using microscopy and digital imaging techniques to document and analyze its morphological features.

steps.description: The fossil was studied using a Nikon Optiphot 2 microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: examine fossil specimen using Nikon Optiphot 2 microscope

steps.description: The drawings were made with the aid of a drawing tube and processed in Adobe Photoshop CS5.
steps.searchable_summary: create and process drawings of fossil using drawing tube and Adobe Photoshop CS5

steps.description: The photos were taken with the aid of a Leica DM 400 B LED microscope using a Leica DFC 450C compact camera.
steps.searchable_summary: capture photos of fossil using Leica DM 400 B LED microscope and Leica DFC 450C camera
